hook.text: Some of the largest known numbers are prime. Finding them has become a worldwide sport.

buildup.text: Mersenne primes take the form 2 raised to a prime power, minus 1. Only 51 are known.

discovery.text: A volunteer network called GIMPS uses home computers around the globe to hunt for new ones.

twist.text: The largest known prime has over 41 million digits. Printing it would fill 9,000 pages.

climax.text: Discovering a new Mersenne prime earns international fame and a cash prize.

punchline.text: The biggest prime needs 9,000 pages to write down.

quiz.question: What form do Mersenne primes take?
options: A product of two smaller primes
